lines.en_lit: like a man clinging to his livaya, Reish Lakish said: When gentiles entered the Sanctuary, they saw cherubs clinging to one another. took them out to the market, and said: These Jews, whose blessing is a blessing and whose curse is a curse, they be occupied with such matters, They immediately debased them, as it is stated: “All who honored her debase her because they have seen her nakedness”

and it was called foundation [shetiyya] taught because the world was created [hushtat] from it. We learned in accordance with the one who said the world was created from Zion. As it was taught Rabbi Eliezer says: The world was created from its center, as it is stated: “When the dust runs into a mass, and the clods cleave fast together”

Rabbi Yehoshua says: world was created from the sides, as it is stated: “For He said to the snow: Become the earth, likewise to the shower of rain, and to the showers of His mighty rain” Rabbi Yitzḥak Nappaḥa said: The Holy One, Blessed be He, cast a stone into the sea, from which the world was created, as it is stated: “Upon what were its foundations fastened; or who laid its cornerstone?”
And the Rabbis say: was created from Zion, as it is stated: “A Psalm of Asaph. God, the Lord God and it states: “Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty,

It was taught Rabbi Eliezer the Great says: “These are the generations of the heaven and the earth when they were created, on the day that the Lord God made earth and heaven” generations of the heavens, were created from the heavens, generations of the earth were created from the earth.

And the Rabbis say: Both these and those were created from Zion, as it is stated: “A Psalm of Asaph. God, the Lord God has spoken and called the earth, from the rising of the sun to its place of setting,” and it says: “Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God has shined forth,” from the beauty of the world was perfected,
took the blood from who was stirring it and he entered What is Like one who whips? Rav Yehuda demonstrated
